message:
fix(tui): guard against zero-width terminal panics in dashboard

Buffer::new(0, 0) and Frame::new(0, _) panic in frankentui. Clamp all
terminal dimensions to minimum 1×1 at three sites: initial size query,
resize event handler, and frame render loop placeholder buffer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
